title: System Settings
description: Manage subscription sync and feature toggles

shortLink.title: Short Links
shortLink.description: When enabled, subscription links will use short codes to hide token info

intervals.title: Scheduled Tasks
intervals.description: Configure task intervals. Restart required for changes to take effect.

masterUrl.title: Master Server URL
masterUrl.description: Install commands for remote servers will use this URL
masterUrl.label: Server URL
masterUrl.hint: Format: protocol + domain or IP (with port), e.g. https://panel.example.com or http://1.2.3.4:12889. Leave empty to use current URL.

telegram.title: Telegram Notifications
telegram.description: Configure Telegram Bot for system event notifications

apiToken.title: API Token
apiToken.description: Access all backend APIs without login
apiToken.regenerateConfirm: Are you sure you want to regenerate the API Token? The old token will be invalidated.
apiToken.usageHint: Use this Token in the MM-Authorization header to access APIs
apiToken.warning:
• This Token grants full access to all backend APIs without login
• Keep this Token secure — leaks may cause data security issues
• The Token is printed in logs on server startup
• Click refresh to regenerate — the old Token is immediately invalidated

sync.title: External Subscription Sync
sync.syncTrafficHint: When enabled, traffic data will include traffic info from external subscriptions
sync.nodeNameFilterHint: Use regex to filter node names. Matching nodes will be excluded. Leave empty to skip filtering.
sync.nodeNameFilterDesc: Regex pattern — matching nodes will be filtered out during sync
sync.forceSyncExternalHint: When enabled, fetching subscriptions will re-fetch the latest nodes from external subscription links
sync.keepNodeNameHint: When enabled, node names in the database are preserved during sync instead of using names from external subscriptions
sync.cacheExpireMinutesHint: Set to 0 to re-fetch on every subscription request. When greater than 0, re-fetch only after the specified minutes
sync.cacheExpireWarning: Note: Fetching every time will affect subscription API response speed
